strengths: buildings gain significant bonus HP each age — extremely durable base
cheap trash units — Skirmishers, Spearmen, and Militia-line all cost less
most complete tech tree in the game — can field almost any unit
Cataphracts resist anti-cavalry bonus damage from Halberdiers and Camels
Greek Fire makes Byzantine navy dominant on water maps
weaknesses: no direct economic bonuses — slowest eco development of any civ
no standout offensive unit until Logistica Cataphracts come online
jack-of-all-trades identity means no single dominant strategy
requires strong game-reading to exploit full tech tree — not beginner friendly
unique_unit: Cataphract — elite heavy cavalry that takes significantly reduced bonus damage from anti-cavalry units like Halberdiers and Camels

unique_tech.castle_age: Greek Fire — Fire Ships gain +1 range, making Byzantine navy extremely hard to contest
unique_tech.imperial_age: Logistica — Cataphracts deal trample damage to surrounding units

economy_bonuses: No direct eco bonus — the primary weakness of the civ
Cheap trash units (Skirmisher, Spear, Militia-line) conserve resources across long wars
build_order_notes: Wall up early, use cheap trash units to deflect rushes, and boom into Castle Age without heavy military spending. Transition into Cataphracts and siege in late game. Greek Fire makes water maps nearly automatic wins. Avoid open-field aggression until Logistica Cataphracts are online.
common_pairings: Persians — Persians boom and supply cavalry while Byzantines hold the base and support with Monks
Aztecs — Aztecs handle aggressive military while Byzantines absorb pressure with cheap trash
Franks — Franks bring powerful Paladins and eco while Byzantines cover with trash units and fast Monk healing

power_spikes.feudal_age: Weak offensively — hold with cheap Skirmishers and Spearmen
power_spikes.castle_age: Moderate — defensive strength peaks and Cataphracts become available but are expensive
power_spikes.imperial_age: Strong — Logistica Cataphracts plus full tech tree plus cheap trash is very difficult to exhaust
